# FutureFluent

> FutureFluent builds AI receptionists and automation workflows for growing businesses. We handle calls, bookings, and admin 24/7 — so your team focuses on what matters.

## What We Do

FutureFluent is an AI automation company specialising in:

- **AI Receptionist**: Voice AI that answers calls, books appointments, routes enquiries, and handles FAQs around the clock. Never miss a lead again.
- **Business Automation**: Custom n8n workflows, AI agents, and integrations that eliminate repetitive admin tasks.
- **RAG & MCP Pipelines**: Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Model Context Protocol implementations that give AI agents access to your business knowledge.
- **IoT Solutions**: Connecting physical systems to intelligent automation layers.
- **Web Apps**: Custom web applications built around automation workflows.
- **Integrations**: Connecting your CRM, calendar, phone system, and databases into a unified intelligent layer.

## Pricing

AI Receptionist plans:
- Starter Reception: $199/month (setup $1,500) — 150 mins included. Best for: sole traders and small teams.
- Core Reception: $399/month (setup $2,500) — 300 mins included. Best for: established small businesses.
- Growth Reception: $649/month (setup $3,500) — 300 mins included. Best for: agencies, clinics, legal firms.
- Scale Pro: $949/month (setup $5,000) — 500 mins included. Best for: multi-location, regulated, or high-volume organisations.
- Enterprise+: Custom pricing. For large-scale custom deployments.

## Who We Help

FutureFluent serves:
- Small businesses that miss calls and lose leads
- Medical practices needing 24/7 patient intake
- Legal firms handling high volumes of enquiries
- Marketing agencies managing client communications
- Multi-location businesses needing consistent call handling
- Any business wanting to scale without adding headcount

## ROI

Businesses using FutureFluent automation typically save 40% of the time their staff spend on inbound communications. For a team of 5 people earning $60,000/year spending 20 hours/week on calls and admin, that's approximately $62,400 in recovered productivity per year.
